name: Roasted Red Bell Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve, core, and seed the peppers. Flatten each half slightly with the palm of your hand. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
2. Arrange the peppers, skin side up, in a single layer on the baking sheet. Place under a preheated broiler, about 3 inches from the heat source, and broil until the skins are charred black. Remove to a paper or plastic bag and seal well for about 15 minutes to steam the peppers. Slip off the charred skins and discard.
Note: Per serving: 24 calories, 6g carbohydrates, no protein, no fat, no cholesterol.
